summary: Legendary 6/26/74 show captured in an amazingly perfect copy, praised as flawless by reviewers.
review: All three reviewers rave about this recording, calling it a definitive and outstanding capture of the legendary June 26‑1974 performance. While no technical details are given, the copy is described as “amazingly perfect,” suggesting excellent audio fidelity.

ai_rating.rationale: All reviews are 5‑star and highly enthusiastic about both the show’s legendary status and the copy’s perfection, but the small number of brief comments limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the copy as flawless and “amazingly perfect,” though no specifics about soundboard vs. audience or mix are provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or pacing were given.
